context: Tests whether the agent generates a valid Google Merchant Center XML RSS product feed with correct field formatting, title/description handling, price format, custom labels for segmentation, and proper availability/variant mapping.

checklist.name: XML RSS format
checklist.description: The output feed file is valid XML in RSS feed format (contains <rss>, <channel>, and <item> elements)

checklist.name: Title truncation
checklist.description: Product variant titles are truncated to a maximum of 150 characters (no g:title value exceeds 150 characters)

checklist.name: Description HTML stripped
checklist.description:
The g:description fields contain no HTML tags (all

, , and other tags are stripped from descriptions)

checklist.name: Description truncation
checklist.description: The g:description fields are truncated to a maximum of 5000 characters

checklist.name: Price format
checklist.description: All g:price and g:sale_price values follow the format '<decimal>.toFixed(2) USD' (e.g., '129.99 USD', '59.95 USD')

checklist.name: custom_label_0 margin
checklist.description: g:custom_label_0 is set to 'high-margin' or 'low-margin' based on product margin (products with margin >= 0.4 get 'high-margin', others get 'low-margin')

checklist.name: custom_label_1 arrival
checklist.description: g:custom_label_1 is set to 'new-arrival' for new arrival products and 'core' for non-new-arrival products

checklist.name: Availability mapping
checklist.description: g:availability is set to 'in stock' when stockQuantity > 0 and 'out of stock' when stockQuantity is 0

checklist.name: GTIN and MPN included
checklist.description: g:gtin and g:mpn are included in item entries when available in the source data (not hardcoded empty or omitted entirely)

checklist.name: Variant-level entries
checklist.description: Each product variant is represented as a separate feed item (e.g., prod-001 produces two entries: TRP-BLK-9 and TRP-BLU-10)

checklist.name: Image fallback
checklist.description: For variants with no variant-level images, the parent product's image URL is used as the g:image_link fallback

checklist.name: Brand in title
checklist.description: Product titles include meaningful identifiers such as color and/or size from the variant title (e.g., 'Trail Runner Pro - Black / Size 9')
